articles.title: rickshaw operators to adhere to approved fares
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, June 27: Ahead of the annual Amarnath Yatra commencing on July 3, the Regional Transport Officer (RTO), Jammu, today directed all e-rickshaw, e-auto and petrol auto-rickshaw operators to strictly adhere to the approved fare structure to ensure...

articles.title: New Mexico governor urges lawmakers to approve $250 taxpayer rebates for high gas prices
articles.description: New Mexico governor Michelle Lujan Grisham calls on state lawmakers to approve $250 rebates for taxpayers, citing a budget windfall and rising gas prices. Some legislators advocate for long-term tax code changes instead of one-time checks.

articles.title: A 2017 Law Is About To Send California Gas Prices Climbing Again
articles.description: California Senate Bill 1, passed in 2017, legalized inflation-linked gas tax increases. One such hike for 2.2 cents a gallon is scheduled for July 1, 2026.

articles.title: Why are fuel prices still high when global crude oil rates have fallen: Kharge
articles.description: “Today, crude oil prices have fallen to $70.71 per barrel. Then why is the Modi government selling petrol at Rs 102.12 per litre and diesel at Rs 95.20 per litre?” Kharge asked.

articles.title: Maine voters are paying attention to Israeli-Palestinian conflict | Letter
articles.description: The recent Democratic Party primary wins of Graham Platner and Matt Dunlap point to a momentous change: Palestine now matters in Maine politics. The Gaza genocide and economic populism are driving voter change. Endless images of dismembered children, a revolt against sending our tax dollars overseas and rising gas prices blamed on the U.S.-Israeli war […]

articles.title: Police solve Sriperumbudur fire case, arrest man for petrol bomb attack
articles.description: Police arrest Chalapathi for a petrol bomb attack in Sriperumbudur, resolving a deadly fire case linked to business rivalry.

articles.title: Jaipur dairy farmers launch M-20 movement against ethanol-blended petrol policy
articles.description: Jaipur dairy farmers launch “M-20 Movement” opposing ethanol-blended petrol policy, demanding rollback and independent probe; plan nationwide protests and symbolic “blended milk.”

articles.title: The AI trade cooled and oil sank. A closer look at Wall Street's volatile week
articles.description: Micron finished the week in the red despite a blockbuster earnings report. But falling oil prices was good news for the fight against inflation.

articles.title: Woman suffers burn injuries as jilted lover sprays petrol on her room, ignites fire
articles.description: Rourkela, Jun 27 (PTI) A woman sustained severe burn injury after her jilted lover allegedly sprayed petrol in the room where she was sleeping and ignited a fire in Odisha’s Sundargarh district, police said on Saturday. The incident took place at Santoshpur village under Bisra police limits in Rourkela at about 1 am on Saturday. […]
